tools.name: search_timeshares
tools.description: Search timeshare listings by resort, brand, state, price range, bedrooms, exchange network

tools.name: get_resort
tools.description: Get resort detail including listings, FL DBPR registration, and payment history

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Get individual listing detail with CFPB complaints for that brand

tools.name: list_brands
tools.description: List all timeshare brands with listing counts, price ranges, and resort counts

tools.name: list_resorts
tools.description: List resorts with listing summaries, filterable by state or brand

tools.name: search_dbpr_projects
tools.description: Search FL DBPR registered timeshare projects

tools.name: get_payment_history
tools.description: Get FL DBPR payment/billing history for a timeshare project

tools.name: search_complaints
tools.description: Search CFPB consumer complaints for timeshare companies

tools.name: get_orientation
tools.description: Get pre-computed context about the timeshare index — use this first

tools.name: create_bridge
tools.description: Create a bridge page — a persistent URL where AI curates timeshare research for a buyer. Returns a shareable URL. The buyer sees property cards with viability grades, rental estimates, fee coverage, and AI notes.

tools.name: add_to_bridge
tools.description: Add a listing to a bridge page by listing ID. The property appears on the buyer page with full economics.
